organic-the-best-way-to-send-money-home-.hook: The best way to send money home is already built into your phone — you just don't know it yet.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator holds phone to camera — 'My family in [Mexico/Philippines/Nepal] used to wait 3-5 days and lose 5% in fees.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record Speed Wallet — open app, enter $200, hit send, show confirmation in under 3 seconds. Beat 3 (26-45s): Cut to text overlay: '$0 fees. Arrives in seconds. Not days.' Beat 4 (46-58s): Direct address — 'Link in bio. Send your first $1 free right now.'
payload.production_notes: Film on iPhone, natural kitchen/living room background for authenticity. Use a real $200 test send during filming — show actual confirmation screen. No music louder than voice. Captions on.

organic-i-sent-bitcoin-to-a-friend-in-3-.hook: I sent Bitcoin to a friend in 3 seconds and it cost me literally $0.00. Here's the wallet I used.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Talking head — 'Everyone told me crypto was complicated. I proved them wrong in 60 seconds.' Beat 2 (8-25s): Screen-record: download Speed Wallet, create account, receive a small Lightning payment live on screen. Beat 3 (26-45s): Zoom in on the $0.00 fee line and the '2-second' timestamp. Text overlay: 'This is Bitcoin Lightning. Not your grandpa's crypto.' Beat 4 (46-58s): 'If I can do it, you can do it. Download link in bio — it's free.'
payload.production_notes: Keep screen-record unedited to signal authenticity. Creator should be visibly non-technical (hoodie, casual setting). Stitch with hook #11 reply format to ride Lightning Network search traffic.

organic-pov-you-just-withdrew-your-casin.hook: POV: You just withdrew your casino winnings instantly instead of waiting 5 business days.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Reaction face — genuine excitement, maybe a small win notification visible. 'Wait… it's already in my wallet?' Beat 2 (7-22s): Split screen: traditional bank withdrawal page showing '3-5 business days' vs Speed Wallet showing funds arrive in real time. Beat 3 (23-42s): Text-on-screen — 'Bitcoin Lightning withdrawals. No holds. No delays. No bank needed.' Beat 4 (43-58s): 'The casinos that use Speed are already live. Comment which one you use.'
payload.production_notes: Use a green-tinted overlay on the 'instant' side vs grey/red on the bank side for visual contrast. Comment prompt drives engagement algo boost. Do NOT show gambling content — focus purely on the payment speed story.

organic-hundi-has-been-moving-money-in-t.hook: Hundi has been moving money in the dark for centuries. Here's why people still use it — and the legal alternative that's actually faster.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-10s): Text-on-screen explainer — 'Hundi: informal cash network. No banks. No receipts. Used by millions of migrants.' Beat 2 (11-28s): 'The problem: no protection if it goes wrong. And governments are cracking down.' Beat 3 (29-45s): 'Speed Wallet sends money via Bitcoin Lightning — same speed, zero fees, fully legal, fully traceable for YOUR protection.' Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Your family deserves better than a handshake deal. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Lean into hook #14's viral format — educational/documentary tone. Use simple text cards over a neutral background. No stock footage needed. Tag relevant diaspora community hashtags (#NepalInUS #FilipinoDiaspora). Save rate will be high — optimize caption for shares.

organic-crypto-gave-me-financial-freedom.hook: Crypto gave me financial freedom — and it started with one $5 send.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Talking head — 'I was scared of crypto for 3 years. Then a friend sent me $5 in Bitcoin and it arrived in 2 seconds.' Beat 2 (9-28s): 'That was my first Lightning transaction. No exchange. No seed phrase drama. Just: download, receive, done.' Beat 3 (29-45s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet onboarding — under 60 seconds from App Store to first wallet. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Your first Bitcoin doesn't have to be complicated. Start with $1. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Mirror hook #13's identity/aspiration tone but ground it in a tiny, low-risk first action ($1/$5) to reduce friction. Creator should be relatable mid-20s demographic. Film vertically in good natural light. Add 'save this' CTA overlay at Beat 3 to boost save rate metric.

paid-your-family-is-losing-hundreds-of-d.hook: Your family is losing hundreds of dollars every time you send money home.
paid-your-family-is-losing-hundreds-of-d.estimate: $1.80–$2.60 (fear-of-loss framing + high-intent remittance audience typically beats benchmark by 18-43%)

payload.problem: Traditional wire transfers and apps like Western Union charge 3–8% per send plus hidden exchange rate markups. On a $500 remittance, that's up to $40 gone before your family sees a cent — and it still takes days.
payload.solution: Speed Wallet sends money internationally over Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Arrives in seconds, not days. Your $500 becomes $500 on the other side. Download free — first send takes under 2 minutes.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Send free today.
payload.audience: Meta — Facebook + Instagram. Target: ages 22-45, Spanish/Tagalog/Hindi preferred language, US-based, income $30K-$70K, interests: sending money abroad, Western Union, Remitly, MoneyGram, immigrant communities.

paid-i-downloaded-a-bitcoin-wallet-and-s.hook: I downloaded a Bitcoin wallet and sent my first payment in 58 seconds. Watch.
paid-i-downloaded-a-bitcoin-wallet-and-s.estimate: $2.40–$3.10 (curiosity-gap + screen-record demo format; slightly below benchmark due to novelty of Lightning angle in crypto-curious segment)

payload.problem: Most people think Bitcoin is too complicated, too slow, or too expensive to actually use day-to-day. They've been right — until Lightning.
payload.solution: Speed Wallet is built on Bitcoin Lightning. Screen-record: open app, create wallet, receive $1 from a friend — 2-second confirmation, $0 fee. No exchange account. No 12-word seed phrase shown to camera. Just: download and go.
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet free. First transaction in under a minute.
payload.audience: TikTok — ages 18-34, interests: cryptocurrency, Bitcoin, personal finance, financial independence, fintech apps. Behavioral: engaged with crypto content last 30 days, has NOT downloaded a crypto app (exclusion of existing converters).

paid-still-waiting-3-days-for-your-withd.hook: Still waiting 3 days for your withdrawal? This is what instant actually looks like.
paid-still-waiting-3-days-for-your-withd.estimate: $3.00–$4.20 (iGaming audience is high-value but smaller pool; competitive CPMs in gambling-adjacent targeting may push above benchmark — offset by strong LTV of segment)

payload.problem: iGaming players lose more than bets — they lose time waiting for payouts to clear. Bank wires hold funds for days. Credit card reversals get flagged. You won. Your money should be yours now.
payload.solution: Casinos on Speed Wallet use Bitcoin Lightning for instant deposits and withdrawals. No bank in the middle. No holds. Funds hit your wallet in under 5 seconds — any amount, any time. Show split-screen: bank payout pending 72hrs vs Speed Wallet confirmed in 3 seconds.
payload.audience: TikTok — ages 21-45, interests: online gambling, sports betting, poker, casino apps, crypto payments. Geo: US states where iGaming is legal (NJ, PA, MI, CT, WV, DE). Exclude under-21.
